info.english_meaning: to sin to soil to make impure to cause pain to hurt
info.hindI_arTa: duHKita honA yA karanA dUzita karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'avfttikarSitA hi strI praduzyet sTitimatyapi' (manu॰9.74) vikAramApnuyAt patiM vyaBicarediti tAtparyArTaH

'yadi yAsyati sanduzwA rAmasyAklizwakarmaRaH neyaM svastimatI senA gaNgAmadya tarizyati' (rA॰gore॰saM॰2.91.11) sanduzwA=vikftamanAH=anizwasaNkalpA samA nArTaH yaTA praduzwavipraduzwayorviprAByAM nArTaH
'priyA tazwAni me kapirvyaktA vyadUduzat' (f0 10865) vyadUduzat=vyakarot vEkftamanEzIt
'kaTaM vayaM nivatsyAmaH kEkeyyA ca vidUzitAH' (rA0 26621) vidUzitA rAjyagarvAt tiraskftA iti tilakakAraH
'na Sezo anyajAtamastyacetAnasya mA paTo vi dukzaH' (f0 747) mA vidukzaH=mA vidUduzaH
'vedAstyAgaSca yajYASca niyamASca tapAMsi ca na vipraduzwaBAvasya sidDiM gacCanti karhicit' (manu0 297).. vipraduzwaBAvasya duzwasvaBAvasya viprAvanarTakO
'na BinnaBARqe BuYjIta na BAvapratidUzite' (manu0 465) BAvapratidUzitaM=yatra mano vicikitsati nirRiktatAmasya BARqasya SaNkate

'anena pratiduzwakarmaRA hatA BavedAryapaTe pare sTitA' (rA0 5123) atra pAWaSudDiratiSaNkyate neha pratirupasargaH loke vyavahitasyopasargasya prayogABAvAt nipAtasya satopyarTo'sPuwaH etezu cArTezu pratiSabdaM paWatyamaraH--pratiH pratiniDO vIpsAlakzaRAdO prayogataH
'parAmfzwA apyasaMraktA nopaduzyanti yozitaH' (hari0 3539) nopaduzyanti na patanti na patitA Bavanti
